discord-nitro.name: Discord Nitro
discord-nitro.description: Boost your Discord experience with Nitro! Animated avatars, custom emojis, bigger uploads, server boosts and more.
discord-nitro.note: Delivered within 1-24 hours after payment confirmation.

netflix.name: Netflix
netflix.description: Stream unlimited movies and TV shows in HD and 4K. Access the full Netflix library with a premium account.
netflix.note: Shared or private accounts available. Ask in ticket.

crunchyroll.name: Crunchyroll
crunchyroll.description: Watch the latest anime with no ads! Simulcasts from Japan, manga library, and offline downloads included.
crunchyroll.note: Full premium access, all regions supported.

spotify.name: Spotify Premium
spotify.description: Listen to music ad-free, download songs, unlimited skips, and highest audio quality available.

xbox-gamepass.name: Xbox Game Pass
xbox-gamepass.description: Access hundreds of games on Xbox and PC. Includes Xbox Live Gold and EA Play with Ultimate.
xbox-gamepass.note: Digital codes delivered instantly or via account.

steam-games.name: Steam Games & Gift Cards
steam-games.description: Get the latest Steam games and gift cards at 30-50% below market prices. Any game, any region!
steam-games.note: Open a ticket and mention the exact game for pricing.

vpn-services.name: VPN Services
vpn-services.description: Stay private and secure online. Unblock geo-restricted content from anywhere in the world.

other-products.name: Other Digital Products
other-products.description: We sell many more digital products! See the list below and open a ticket for any product.
other-products.note: Apple Music, Disney+, Hulu, Duolingo Plus, and much more available!
